name: Create and Evaluate Indexes
description: Create an index on a large table and capture EXPLAIN output before and after to observe the difference

checks.name: Index exists on customer_events
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM duckdb_indexes() WHERE table_name = 'customer_events' AND index_name = 'idx_customer_events_cid';
checks.description: Index idx_customer_events_cid must be created on customer_events(customer_id)

checks.name: Point lookup for CUST-0042 returns 400 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM customer_events WHERE customer_id = 'CUST-0042';

checks.name: Both explain tables exist
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('explain_no_index','explain_with_index');
checks.description: EXPLAIN output must be saved into explain_no_index and explain_with_index tables
